title: Pisces Base
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Pisces Base''' was the name of a provincial floating [[City/Legends|city]] located on the [[Ocean/Legends|ocean]] surfaces of [[Dac/Legends|Dac]]. It subsisted on fishing, tourism and underwater mining operations. In [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]], [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Admiral Ackbar]] brought [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and the [[Droid/Legends|droids]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] to Pisces Base aboard a modified [[LAVr QH-7 Chariot]]. From there, they acquired a [[Mon Calamari submersible]] and traveled to the undersea city known as [[Aquarius]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Glove of Darth Vader]]'' {{1st}}
